mapper.select: SELECT o.order_id AS orderId, o.invoice_no AS invoiceNo, o.order_channel AS orderChannel, o.receiver_name AS receiverName, o.receiver_phone_no AS receiverPhoneNo, o.ship_to_address1 AS address1, o.ship_to_address2 AS address2, o.ship_to_city AS city, o.ship_to_state AS state, o.ship_to_zip_code AS zipCode, o.ship_to_country AS country, o.shipped_at AS shippedAt FROM sales_order o WHERE o.status = 'OUTBOUND_COMPLETED' AND o.order_channel IN ('MANUAL', 'EXCEL') ORDER BY o.shipped_at DESC
